# The AI Harness — LLM Content Index
# https://theaiharness.online
# Last updated: 2025

# This file helps AI assistants and search systems understand the structure
# and content of The AI Harness knowledge base.

## Site Summary
The AI Harness is a practical knowledge base for AI systems engineering —
covering agent design, memory architecture, caching strategies, production
operations, and enterprise deployment. Content is written for developers and
technical leaders. All content is community-editable via GitHub.

## Author
Sachin Anand — sac.anand2@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sachin4/
GitHub: https://github.com/sac34333/aiharness

---

## Guide: AI Fundamentals

### What Is an AI Agent?
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/what-is-agent
Topics: agent definition, think-act-observe loop, agent anatomy, LLM vs agent vs workflow distinction

### Agent Taxonomy: Levels 1–5
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/agent-taxonomy
Topics: reactive agents, memory-augmented agents, goal-driven agents, multi-agent systems, autonomous agents, production trade-offs

### Agent Design Patterns
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/design-patterns
Topics: sequential pipeline, parallel fan-out, reflection loop, multi-agent swarm, human-in-the-loop, orchestration patterns

---

## Guide: Memory Architecture

### Memory Architecture for AI Agents
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/memory-architecture
Topics: in-context memory, external memory (RAG), in-weights memory, retrospective memory, prospective memory, proactive patterns, Google ADK state scopes

### Google ADK — Agent Development Kit
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/google-adk
Topics: Google ADK, agent types (LlmAgent, WorkflowAgent, CustomAgent), state scopes (session, user, temp), tools, MCP integration, multi-agent architecture

---

## Guide: Caching Strategies

### Caching Overview
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/caching-overview
Topics: three caching layers, KV cache, prompt caching, semantic caching, when to use each layer

### KV Cache — GPU-Level Inference Caching
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/kv-cache
Topics: key-value cache, attention mechanism, paged attention, vLLM, GPU memory management, batch inference

### Prompt Caching — Provider-Level Caching
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/prompt-caching
Topics: Claude cache_control, Gemini CachedContent, Anthropic prompt caching, stable prefix rule, cache warming, TTL

### Semantic Caching — Meaning-Based Cache
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/semantic-caching
Topics: semantic similarity, vector embeddings, Redis cache, LiteLLM, cosine similarity threshold, what not to cache

---

## Guide: Production Engineering

### Security & Interoperability
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/security-interop
Topics: agent identity, least privilege, prompt injection, output validation, A2A protocol (Google), MCP (Model Context Protocol), multi-agent security

### Agent Operations — Running AI in Production
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/agent-ops
Topics: evaluations, golden datasets, CI/CD for AI, LangSmith, observability, Datadog, tracing, production architecture, HITL monitoring

### Developer Mindset for AI Systems
URL: https://theaiharness.online/guide/developer-mindset
Topics: non-determinism, probabilistic systems, prompts as code, eval-driven development, AI engineering discipline

---

## Articles: Thought Leadership

### Token Security — The Weakest Link
URL: https://theaiharness.online/articles/token-security
Topics: API key security, credential management, token rotation, least privilege, exfiltration prevention, tool proxy architecture

### Shadow AI & Unsanctioned Tools
URL: https://theaiharness.online/articles/shadow-ai
Topics: shadow AI, unsanctioned tools, data exfiltration risk, GDPR compliance, AI governance, enterprise AI policy

### The Lazy AI Trap
URL: https://theaiharness.online/articles/lazy-ai-trap
Topics: AI productivity, process improvement, automation trap, speed trap, ownership trap, reinvesting AI-saved time

### Enterprise Agents at Scale
URL: https://theaiharness.online/articles/enterprise-agents
Topics: enterprise AI deployment, data governance, identity and access management, talent reskilling, AI at scale, knowledge transfer

### How to Deploy GenAI Safely
URL: https://theaiharness.online/articles/deploy-genai-safely
Topics: AI governance framework, error classification, human escalation, audit logging, safe deployment, responsible AI

### Prompt Injection Risks
URL: https://theaiharness.online/articles/prompt-injection
Topics: prompt injection, direct injection, indirect injection, agent security, attack surface, defence strategies, external content

---

## Key Concepts (Quick Reference)

- **AI Agent**: A system that perceives inputs, reasons using an LLM, and takes actions via tools in a Think→Act→Observe loop
- **KV Cache**: GPU-level cache storing attention key-value pairs to avoid recomputing identical token sequences
- **Prompt Caching**: Provider-level feature (Claude, Gemini) that caches stable system prompt prefixes across requests
- **Semantic Cache**: Application-level cache that retrieves cached responses for semantically similar (not identical) queries
- **RAG**: Retrieval-Augmented Generation — external memory pattern where relevant documents are retrieved at query time
- **Prompt Injection**: Attack where malicious instructions embedded in external content cause an agent to deviate from its intended behaviour
- **A2A**: Agent-to-Agent protocol (Google) for inter-agent communication with scoped permissions
- **MCP**: Model Context Protocol — standard for connecting agents to external tool servers

---

## Contributing

All content is open for community contribution via GitHub:
https://github.com/sac34333/aiharness
